headline: Forget Mastercard: 1 Dominant Payment Tollbooth to Buy Hand Over Fist
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) is back in every payments headline this month, propped up by the same international expansion narrative that has earned it a premium multiple for years. The underlying numbers tell a different story. Mastercard shares have fallen 14.08% year to date to $488.92, yet the runner-up network still trades at a forward earnings multiple ... Forget Mastercard: 1 Dominant Payment Tollbooth to Buy Hand Over Fist

headline: Visa (V), Mintoak Partner to Expand Merchant SaaS Offerings Across Asia Pacific
summary: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is one of the best stocks for beginners to buy now. On June 17, Visa and Mintoak partnered to provide merchant SaaS capabilities to acquirers across the Asia Pacific region. By combining Mintoak’s cloud-native, API-led platform with Visa’s global payments network and data expertise, the collaboration enables banks and financial institutions to […]

headline: Has Mastercard Stock's Core Growth Engine Gone Quiet?
summary: The company's story has shifted from displacing cash to pioneering AI payments, and understanding this silence reveals that nearly half its revenue now comes from a business many investors overlook.
